The Karecation experience

A clean, contemporary luxury concept for guests who want beauty transformation and a polished Seoul experience.

✦

Pickup & Drop-off

Comfortable pickup support from hotel or airport, with smooth transfers throughout the day.

✦

Skin Clinic Care

Premium facial treatment, hydration, lifting care, calming care, and tailored clinic consultation.

✦

Scalp Diagnosis & Spa

Complimentary scalp diagnosis and a relaxing spa session to assess scalp condition and start care with comfort.

✦

Celebrity Hair & Makeup

Refined Korean styling shaped around a polished, camera-ready celebrity-inspired look.

Book Your Karecation

Your request goes directly to the Karecation team, where your preferences are carefully reviewed and reflected in your experience.

Select your preferred dates
Drag across the calendar to choose a preferred date range.
Choose one or more programs.
Choose any add-on experiences you would like.
Some preferred dates may already be fully booked. Please check your confirmation email from the Karecation team for final availability and booking confirmation.

Exclusive Perks for All Programs Guests

Guests who book the full Karecation experience receive a selection of complimentary extras designed to make the journey more seamless, memorable, and thoughtfully curated.

✦

Complimentary Olive Young Beauty Curation

Receive one-on-one product recommendations tailored to your tone, color palette, and skin condition, with an Olive Young manager and help with the tax-free process in one seamless experience.

✦

Snapshot Service

After your makeover, skin clinic visit, or scalp spa, we capture your healing and glow-up moments through a snapshot service and provide the photos on the same day.

✦

Dining Recommendations & Reservations

Without any separate booking fee, we recommend restaurants on demand based on your food preferences and preferred atmosphere, and assist with reservations to complete your day smoothly.

✦

Personalized Beauty Itinerary

We thoughtfully plan your beauty day around your appointments, shopping, dining, and preferred pace, so your Karecation feels smooth, efficient, and beautifully curated from start to finish.

Add-on experiences

Optional upgrades that make Karecation feel even more personal, photogenic, and distinctly Korean.

✦

Personal Color Consultation

Discover tones, shades, and beauty directions that complement your features for smarter shopping and styling choices.

✦

Premium Hotel Stay

Extend the experience with a comfortable premium stay in Seoul, designed to make your beauty journey feel seamless and restorative.

✦

Hanbok Styling

Add a distinctly Korean touch with hanbok styling that pairs beautifully with your beauty day for a more memorable, photo-ready experience.

Sample schedule

A thoughtfully curated itinerary for a seamless and elevated beauty day in Seoul.

Morning
Pickup + premium clinic care

Begin with pickup service and arrive at a premium clinic for personalized facial care and treatment planning.

Midday
Scalp care + refresh

Continue with a professional scalp care session designed to leave the scalp cleaner, calmer, and refreshed.

Afternoon
Hair, makeup, and beauty item shopping

Move into a polished celebrity-style hair and makeup session, followed by curated beauty item shopping.

Evening
Premium hotel check-in

Close the day with a smooth transfer and check-in at a premium hotel to complete the Karecation experience.

Questions, answered

Minimal information, clearly structured.

Who is Karecation for?

Karecation is designed for international guests who want a luxury, high-touch beauty experience in Seoul without arranging every step independently.

Can the package be customized?

Yes. The website presents a flagship structure, but your consultation can shape the final flow, beauty focus, and level of support.

Can I contact Karecation directly?

Yes. Simply submit the form below and our team will get back to you as soon as possible.
